title: Fire extinguishers
doc_html:
§355.  Fire extinguishers

Every motor vehicle engaged in the transportation of passengers for hire on the highways shall be equipped with at least one quart of chemical type fire extinguisher, in good condition and conveniently located for immediate use.

Acts 1962, No. 310, §1.
